threats.title: Weak Authentication Bypass
threats.description: An attacker could potentially bypass authentication mechanisms, gaining unauthorized access to the system. This could occur due to weak password policies, lack of multi-factor authentication, or vulnerabilities in the authentication logic itself.  The absence of detailed authentication information makes assessing the risk extremely difficult.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the authentication code, brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, or social engineering to obtain valid credentials.
mitigations: Implement strong password policies (length, complexity, rotation).
Enforce Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for all users.
Regularly audit authentication logs for suspicious activity and implement intrusion detection systems.

threats.title: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Misconfigured Cloud Storage
threats.description: Due to the unknown cloud environment configuration, there's a risk of sensitive data being exposed through misconfigured cloud storage buckets or APIs.  Lack of details about security controls makes this a high-priority concern.
threats.attack_vector: Unauthorized access to cloud storage buckets or APIs due to weak access controls, default configurations, or vulnerabilities in the cloud infrastructure.
mitigations: Implement strict access controls for all cloud storage buckets and APIs.
Regularly scan cloud storage for misconfigurations and vulnerabilities.
Utilize encryption to protect sensitive data at rest and in transit.

threats.title: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
threats.description: The system may not adequately sanitize or validate user input, leading to potential data injection attacks (e.g., SQL injection, XSS).  Without knowing the system's data handling processes, it's impossible to determine the extent of this risk.
threats.attack_vector: An attacker injects malicious code or commands into input fields, which are then processed by the application without proper sanitization, leading to data corruption or unauthorized access.
mitigations: Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user inputs.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious requests.

threats.title: IDOR Vulnerability in API Access Control
threats.description: The system may lack proper authorization checks, allowing users to access resources or perform actions they are not authorized to perform by manipulating parameters in API requests. Without knowing the authorization mechanisms, it's impossible to accurately assess this risk.
threats.attack_vector: An attacker exploits vulnerabilities in the API authorization logic to gain access to resources or perform actions belonging to another user or with elevated privileges.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization checks for all API endpoints.
Use a principle of least privilege to restrict user access to only the resources they need.
Regularly review and test API authorization controls.

threats.title: Lack of Audit Logging
threats.description: Insufficient logging of user actions and system events makes it difficult to track down the source of security incidents, investigate breaches, or determine accountability. The absence of documented audit procedures exacerbates this risk.
threats.attack_vector: An attacker can perform malicious actions without leaving a traceable record, making it difficult to identify and prosecute them.
mitigations: Implement comprehensive logging of all user actions, system events, and API calls.
Securely store logs and regularly review them for suspicious activity.
Establish clear audit procedures and assign responsibility for log analysis.

gaps: Weak Authentication Bypass - Insufficient logging and access control mechanisms.
Misconfigured Cloud Storage - Lack of granular access controls and data classification.
Unvalidated Input - Absence of robust input validation and sanitization.
IDOR Vulnerability - Weak API access control implementation.
Lack of Audit Logging - Limited audit trail coverage.
priorities: High - Weak Authentication Bypass, Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Misconfigured Cloud Storage, Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
Medium - IDOR Vulnerability, Lack of Audit Logging

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class api_gateway,auth_service,database threat

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Authentication Bypass
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Exposure of Sensitive Data due to Misconfigured Cloud Storage
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: IDOR Vulnerability in API Access Control
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Lack of Audit Logging
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-778
    owasp: A09:2021
    threat_category: Repudiation
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
